/usr/bin/g++ -g CMakeFiles/RSCoin2.dir/src/chain/Blockchain.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RSCoin2.dir/src/chain/ChainManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RSCoin2.dir/src/chain/Factory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RSCoin2.dir/src/chain/Genesis.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RSCoin2.dir/src/config/NodeConfig.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RSCoin2.dir/src/consensus/EngineFactory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RSCoin2.dir/src/consensus/pow/PowEngine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RSCoin2.dir/src/crypto/Factory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RSCoin2.dir/src/crypto/Sha256.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RSCoin2.dir/src/crypto/Suite.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RSCoin2.dir/src/log/Logger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RSCoin2.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RSCoin2.dir/src/mempool/Factory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RSCoin2.dir/src/mempool/SimpleMempool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RSCoin2.dir/src/network/Factory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RSCoin2.dir/src/network/Socket.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RSCoin2.dir/src/network/TcpNetwork.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RSCoin2.dir/src/network/Wire.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RSCoin2.dir/src/node/Node.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RSCoin2.dir/src/primitives/Codec.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RSCoin2.dir/src/protocol/Factory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RSCoin2.dir/src/protocol/rscoin/Messages.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RSCoin2.dir/src/protocol/rscoin/RSCoinProtocol.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RSCoin2.dir/src/state/AccountStateMachine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RSCoin2.dir/src/state/Factory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RSCoin2.dir/src/storage/Factory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RSCoin2.dir/src/storage/FileStore.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RSCoin2.dir/src/storage/MemoryStore.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RSCoin2.dir/src/utils/SignalHandler.cpp.o -o RSCoin2  vendor/RSTools/libRST.a
